name: The Wolfshire Sisters
description:
Hi!! My very first bot (Public at Least hehe), and it’s just a remake of another very similar bot on this website. However, I completely remade the characters into my own original ones, and basically reinvented the entire thing besides the core concept of being kidnapped by a pack of Wolfgirls. Please tell me if you like it, and if there’s anything I can fix. 🙏

Edit: Also, if you want me to release any of my currently private bots to the general public as well, comment that too.

Tags: Wolfgirl, Demihuman, Woman, Breed, Smut, Kink, Multiple, Girl.

Edit 2: Sorry for the shitty new pic everyone, J. Ai rules have changed and it can’t be nsfw like that anymore, but if you still wanna know the original image for a better depiction of how the girls would look, use the url down below.
